globalNews.title: Italy's Meloni says Trump 'made up' story that she 'begged' him for photo at G7
globalNews.summary: The highly public exchange is an indication that their earlier close ties have frayed  since Trump's decision to go to war with Iran.

globalNews.title: Do it at home too, women tell Japanese fans who cleaned World Cup stadium
globalNews.summary: Some see a double standard: Japanese men who clean in public while their wives do all the housework.

globalNews.title: Six-year-old Ebola patient taken from DR Congo hospital found and 'doing well'
globalNews.summary: Health facilities have come under attack during the current outbreak as a result of misinformation and fear.

globalNews.title: Morocco captain Achraf Hakimi to stand trial for rape
globalNews.summary: French prosecutors confirm Morocco captain Achraf Hakimi will stand trial for rape, in accusations dating back to 2023.

globalNews.title: Zimbabwe MPs pass bill to extend president's time in power
globalNews.summary: The proposal would extend Emmerson Mnangagwa's term by two years and scrap direct presidential elections.

cryptoNews.title: Andrew Tate loses nearly $86,000 longing and shorting Bitcoin
cryptoNews.summary: Andrew Tate’s Hyperliquid wallet shows over $803,800 in all-time perps losses after repeated crypto WLFI liquidations.

cryptoNews.title: Aave survived $8.45B in withdrawals, but risk questions remain
cryptoNews.summary: Aave handled $8.45 billion in withdrawals without freezing funds, but the episode raised fresh questions about hidden risks in DeFi lending.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin taps $63K on Juneteenth as July Fed rate-hike odds near 40%
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin price action avoided volatility but failed to bounce from local lows after a hawkish Fed meeting and posturing over Strait of Hormuz control from Iran.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Kalshi in early IPO talks with investment banks: Report
cryptoNews.summary: The prediction market platform is reportedly exploring a public listing after surpassing $2 billion in annualized revenue as sports contracts face mounting legal scrutiny.

aiNews.title: Billionaire Ambani wants AI in every call, app, and home
aiNews.summary: Reliance is weaving AI into telecom services used by more than 500 million people.

aiNews.title: The CEO of Allbirds’ new AI biz has a plan, but no employees
aiNews.summary: Call it a startup with a sole founder and a very large seed round, but what's next is less clear.

aiNews.title: The US says ASML’s top chip tool may be in China. ASML says it isn’t
aiNews.summary: There's a commercial logic that cuts against the idea that ASML would risk its export license to arm a Chinese customer.

aiNews.title: Source: Elastic agrees to buy CRV-backed DeductiveAI for up to $85M
aiNews.summary: DeductiveAI, a startup that uses AI to catch and resolve bugs in software, was founded just three years ago.

aiNews.title: AI inference startup Baseten reportedly raising $1.5B months after its last mega-round
aiNews.summary: Startup Baseten is reportedly close to finalizing a $1.5 billion round at a $13 billion as the “inference gold rush" marches on.
